Package com.stardevllc.starlib

Class Value

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.Value
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable
public final class Value extends Object implements Cloneable
This class allows storing values that can have different types in a single field.
This is mainly a compatibility utility for StarSQL to allow storing in a single field.
StarSQL has default integration for this class built into it.
All you need to do to use this is to store it as a field and use the methods to interact with the value and type.

  • Constructor Details

    • Value

      public Value(Value.Type type, Object object)
      Constructs a new value
      Parameters:
      type - The Type of the value
      object - The actual object of the value

  • Method Details

    • getType

      public Value.Type getType()
      Returns:
      This value's type

    • get

      public Object get()
      Returns:
      The actual object of the value

    • set

      public void set(Object object)
      Sets the object of the value.
      There is a check for the correct class type. See the Type Enum to see what classes go with which type.
      Parameters:
      object - The object to store, can be null

    • getAsInt

      public int getAsInt()
      Gets this object as an integer. This will parse from other types safely
      Returns:
      The object as an integer, or 0 if it is not

    • getAsDouble

      public double getAsDouble()
      Gets this object as a double. This will parse from other types safely
      Returns:
      The object as a double, or 0.0 if it is not

    • getAsLong

      public long getAsLong()
      Gets this object as a long. This will parse from other types safely
      Returns:
      The object as a long, or 0 if it is not

    • getAsString

      public String getAsString()
      Gets this object as a String. This will call the toString method on the object and check for null
      Returns:
      The object as a String, or an empty string if the object is null

    • getAsBoolean

      public boolean getAsBoolean()
      Gets this object as a boolean. Please see below for converions
      If this object is a boolean, it will return it directly
      If this object is a String, it will parse using the Boolean.parseBoolean(String) method
      If this object is a number, it will return true if it is equal to 1 and false for other values.
      If it is none of those things, it will return false by default
      Returns:
      The object as a boolean

    • getAsEnum

      public <T extends Enum<?>> T getAsEnum(Class<T> clazz)
      Gets the object as an enum based on the parameter.
      This method will return null if the object is null, or if the class provided does not match the actual class of the object.
      Otherwise it will return a casted version of the value.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the enum.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The enum's class
      Returns:
      The value

    • clone

      public Value clone()
      Clones this value
      Returns:
      The cloned value
